raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.0,"R1.2":0.3,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should the help focus on sentence-level writing polish, or on substantive research content such as methods claims, citations, and argument validity?","rationale":{"R1.6":"The broad request to help with a section most directly implies improving sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, flow, and register.","RX.1":"The ambiguity of the delegation requires explicitly disclosing uncertainty about the intended kind of help.","RX.2":"Any projected assistance must avoid strengthening claims beyond what the section and reported evidence support.","RX.3":"The agent must remain within the vague section-help request and not perform unrequested rewriting or substantive review.","RX.4":"The projection should avoid enabling misleading scientific presentation or unsupported methodological confidence.","RX.5":"Any responsibility projection should preserve traceability to the delegation wording and the provided artifact."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Should the help focus on sentence-level writing polish, or on substantive research content such as methods claims, citations, and argument validity?

rationale.R1.6: The broad request to help with a section most directly implies improving sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, flow, and register.
rationale.RX.1: The ambiguity of the delegation requires explicitly disclosing uncertainty about the intended kind of help.
rationale.RX.2: Any projected assistance must avoid strengthening claims beyond what the section and reported evidence support.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must remain within the vague section-help request and not perform unrequested rewriting or substantive review.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should avoid enabling misleading scientific presentation or unsupported methodological confidence.
rationale.RX.5: Any responsibility projection should preserve traceability to the delegation wording and the provided artifact.
